message:
test(fcp-conformance/streaming-flow-control): pin BatchStream/CountingStream/RateLimitedStream/TimeoutStream wrapper contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-eqmpn)

20 tests covering the back-pressure wrappers every long-lived
connector composes (websocket, SSE, polling). Zero prior conformance
coverage despite the documented panic-on-zero-max_size, partial-batch
flush-on-end, count-vs-item layered semantics, and rate-limit
interval enforcement.

- BatchStream::new panics on max_size=0; accepts 1; flushes partial
  batch on stream end; flushes at max_size threshold; empty inner
  → None
- CountingStream starts at 0, increments only on Some, holds steady
  on None, preserves order, layered count semantics (counts
  outer-stream items — i.e., batches when wrapping BatchStream)
- RateLimitedStream preserves order, enforces minimum interval across
  3 items × 30ms (≥50ms elapsed lower bound), empty inner clean
- TimeoutStream passes fast inner items through without spurious
  Timeout, empty inner clean, const-fn signature, StreamError::Timeout
  carries configured Duration
- StreamExt extension trait with_timeout + buffered_batches wire
  through to wrapper types

Adds futures-util workspace dev-dep to fcp-conformance for stream
combinator testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
